rationale: Vendored, pinned, SHA256-verified build tool. esbuild has zero transitive npm deps. React/ReactDOM/Lucide remain vendored UMD globals (marked esbuild 'external'), so this binary is the entire new supply-chain surface. Update deliberately: bump version, refetch tarball, update BOTH sha256 fields + published date, and confirm the new version satisfies cooldown_days_required (see scripts/check_esbuild_cooldown.py).
